productTitle: Ubiquiti G4 Doorbell Pro PoE Gang Box White
name: Ubiquiti G4 Doorbell Pro PoE Gang Box White
title: Ubiquiti G4 Doorbell Pro PoE Gang Box White
short_description: Secure and versatile mounting solution for G4 Doorbell Pro PoE with flat or 25° angled mounting options. Integrates with single-gang boxes.
description: Ubiquiti introduces the G4 Doorbell Pro PoE Gang Box Mount, a secure and versatile mounting solution designed to enhance the installation of your G4 Doorbell Pro PoE. This innovative mount provides flat or angled mounting options to suit your specific needs and preferences. The G4 Doorbell Pro PoE Gang Box Mount seamlessly integrates with both old-work and new-work single-gang boxes, ensuring a hassle-free installation process. Whether you're upgrading an existing setup or installing a new doorbell, this mount makes it easy to secure your G4 Doorbell Pro PoE in place.

detailed_description.heading: Secure and Versatile Mounting
detailed_description.text: Ubiquiti introduces the G4 Doorbell Pro PoE Gang Box Mount, a secure and versatile mounting solution designed to enhance the installation of your G4 Doorbell Pro PoE. This innovative mount provides flat or angled mounting options to suit your specific needs and preferences. The G4 Doorbell Pro PoE Gang Box Mount seamlessly integrates with both old-work and new-work single-gang boxes, ensuring a hassle-free installation process. Whether you're upgrading an existing setup or installing a new doorbell, this mount makes it easy to secure your G4 Doorbell Pro PoE in place.

detailed_description.heading: Flat or Angled Mounting
detailed_description.text: Choose from two mounting options to achieve the ideal viewing angle for your G4 Doorbell Pro PoE. The flat mount provides a straightforward installation, while the 25° angled wedge mount allows you to adjust the camera angle for a wider field of view. Designed specifically for the G4 Doorbell Pro PoE, this mount ensures a perfect fit and secure connection. The mount's precise design offering a clean and professional appearance.
